generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components //
instance LightingSystemActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Automated lighting system integrated via Eclipse Ditto middleware for bidirectional control with the Digital Twin, supporting adaptive lighting policies including reinforcement learning-based optimization."
]

instance HVACUnitActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC unit actuator modeled within BIM environment and configured via Eclipse Ditto for real-time climate control synchronization with the Digital Twin, enabling energy-efficient operational adjustments."
]

instance AutomatedShadingDevice : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Automated shading system integrated through Eclipse Ditto middleware, enabling dynamic control based on real-time environmental sensor data and reinforcement learning policies for visual comfort optimization."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT temperature sensor deployed across building infrastructure transmitting real-time environmental data via Eclipse Hono to the Digital Twin for operational monitoring and adaptive control."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT occupancy sensor collecting real-time occupancy data transmitted through Eclipse Hono to the Digital Twin for space utilization analysis and adaptive system responses."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT light sensor measuring ambient light levels transmitted via Eclipse Hono to the Digital Twin for dynamic lighting control optimization and energy efficiency."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyMonitor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT energy monitor tracking real-time energy consumption data transmitted through Eclipse Hono to the Digital Twin for predictive maintenance and operational efficiency analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

instance DeviceStatusSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT device status sensor reporting operational states of building systems transmitted via Eclipse Hono to the Digital Twin for system health monitoring and fault detection."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DeviceStatusDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMonitor
]

instance DeviceStatusDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DeviceStatusSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMAssetModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically enriched BIM model representing geometric, spatial, and functional characteristics of building components (rooms, systems, devices) serving as the foundational semantic backbone for the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler, ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance RuntimeDataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structured representation of sensor readings, device states, and control logic extracted from BIM and integrated via Eclipse Ditto for real-time system synchronization and adaptive management."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler, ReinforcementLearningEnabler
]

instance ControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-based policy models (e.g., BOREALIS project) and rule-based automation configurations for Building Control Systems operations, deployed via Eclipse Ditto middleware."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 assets providing high-fidelity 3D visualization of the Digital Twin for interactive monitoring, simulation, and immersive stakeholder collaboration."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Enabler
]

instance MetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Device configurations, tenant IDs, and endpoint addresses stored within BIM for automated deployment and runtime configuration management of Digital Twin components."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler, ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings mapped to corresponding BIM elements for visualization, analysis, and adaptive control of HVAC systems."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler, VisualizationModel
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy patterns transmitted from IoT sensors and mapped to BIM zones for space utilization analysis and adaptive system responses."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler, ControlModel
]

instance LightData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ambient light level measurements used for dynamic lighting control optimization and energy efficiency calculations within the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler, VisualizationModel
]

instance EnergyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption metrics integrated with BIM models for predictive maintenance alerts and operational efficiency optimization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler, ReinforcementLearningEnabler
]

instance DeviceStatusData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational status reports of building systems transmitted from IoT sensors and processed for system health monitoring and fault detection."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DeviceStatusDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler, PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Lightweight IoT connectivity framework enabling device management and real-time data ingestion from physical sensors to the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Service-oriented middleware facilitating bidirectional twin synchronization, data management, and runtime configuration of Digital Twin components."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, AdaptiveControlService, PredictiveMaintenanceService, VisualizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "High-fidelity visualization platform providing interactive 3D monitoring and simulation capabilities for the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering methodologies implementing model-to-model and model-to-text transformations for automated Digital Twin deployment from BIM."
    DTDFVocab:enables DeploymentService, ConfigurationManagementService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning frameworks enabling adaptive control policies (e.g., BOREALIS project) for dynamic optimization of building systems."
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveControlService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time visualization and analysis of building operational data through the Digital Twin interface."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalEfficiencyInsight, SystemHealthInsight
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing reinforcement learning-based adaptive control policies for dynamic adjustment of lighting, HVAC, and shading systems."
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveControlRecommendationAction, EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service analyzing sensor trends to generate predictive maintenance alerts for potential equipment failures."
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceAlertAction, EquipmentPerformanceInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing immersive 3D visualization of the Digital Twin through Unreal Engine 5 for interactive monitoring and simulation."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight, StakeholderCollaborationInsight
]

instance DeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service automating the deployment of Digital Twin components from enriched BIM models using model-driven engineering techniques."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentConfigurationAction
]

instance ConfigurationManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling runtime configuration management of Digital Twin components without full redeployment."
    DTDFVocab:provides ConfigurationUpdateAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OperationalEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time metrics on energy consumption, occupancy patterns, and equipment performance enabling data-driven operational optimization."
]

instance SystemHealthInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring of building system health status providing early warnings for potential operational issues."
]

instance AdaptiveControlRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustments to lighting, HVAC, or shading systems based on reinforcement learning policies to optimize comfort and energy use."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven insights on energy consumption patterns enabling targeted optimization strategies for building operations."
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated alerts generated from sensor trend analysis indicating potential equipment failures requiring maintenance intervention."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EquipmentPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance metrics and degradation indicators for building equipment enabling proactive maintenance planning."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building systems and operational data enabling immersive monitoring and analysis."
]

instance StakeholderCollaborationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual analytics tools enabling architects, engineers, and facility managers to collaborate on data-driven decision making."
]

instance DeploymentConfigurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation of runtime artifacts (e.g., Ditto configurations, Unreal Engine assets) from enriched BIM models."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ConfigurationUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Runtime adjustments to Digital Twin configurations without requiring full system redeployment."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C18: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical built environment containing all building systems and components modeled within the Digital Twin constellation."
    base:contains LightingSystemActuator, HVACUnitActuator, AutomatedShadingDevice, TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, LightSensor, EnergyMonitor, DeviceStatusSensor
]

instance DigitalTwinConstellation : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Comprehensive Digital Twin system integrating all models, data, enablers, and services for building infrastructure monitoring and optimization."
    base:contains BIMAssetModel, RuntimeDataModel, ControlModel, VisualizationModel, MetadataModel, EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler, UnrealEngine5Enabler, ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler, ReinforcementLearningEnabler, RealTimeMonitoringService, AdaptiveControlService, PredictiveMaintenanceService, VisualizationService, DeploymentService, ConfigurationManagementService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction is enabled through **control logic embedded in the DT**, which generates outputs (e.g., **adjustment commands for lighting, HVAC, or shading systems**) and transmits them back to physical actuators via **Eclipse Ditto’s bidirectional communication channels**. The framework supports **runtime configuration management**, allowing facility managers to adjust control parameters (e.g., setpoints, schedules) directly through the DT interface, which then propagates these changes to the physical BCS. This interaction is critical for **closed-loop control systems**, such as those implemented in the **BOREALIS project** for adaptive lighting."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on **real-time and near-real-time scales**, with synchronization frequencies determined by the **sampling rates of IoT sensors** (e.g., **1-second intervals for environmental sensors, 5-minute intervals for energy consumption data**). The framework supports **event-driven updates** for critical alerts (e.g., occupancy changes, equipment failures) and **periodic synchronization** for less time-sensitive data. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the **temporal fidelity** of the DT’s synchronization with the physical twin, ensuring alignment between virtual and physical states."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented, modular architecture** with the following components:
   - **BIM Core**: The **semantic backbone** for asset representation and device modeling.
   - **IoT Layer**: **Eclipse Hono** for device connectivity and **Eclipse Ditto** for twin synchronization.
   - **Control Layer**: **Runtime policies** (e.g., reinforcement learning models) for adaptive management.
   - **Visualization Layer**: **Unreal Engine 5** for immersive interaction.
   - **Extension Layer**: **Modular services** (e.g., analytics, maintenance tools) integrated via standardized APIs.
   The constellation supports **bidirectional data flows** between physical and virtual systems, enabling **closed-loop control** and **real-time decision-making**."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **multiple lifecycle stages**, from **design and construction (as-designed)** to **operation and maintenance (as-operated)**. During the **design phase**, the BIM model serves as the primary asset model, enriched with **runtime semantics** (e.g., sensor configurations, control logic). In the **construction phase**, the DT supports **automated commissioning** of building systems. During **operation**, the DT enables **real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control**, while in the **adaptation/refurbishment phase**, it facilitates **data-driven decision-making** for retrofits and upgrades. The framework also supports **post-occupancy evaluation**, where sensor data is used to refine models and policies."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
   - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**: Quantifies the **alignment between virtual and physical states** by comparing sensor data and DT outputs.
   - **Model validation**: **Static and dynamic checks** on BIM models to ensure semantic consistency and completeness.
   - **Uncertainty quantification**: **Statistical analysis** of sensor data to assess model accuracy and drift over time (e.g., addressing **semantic drift** as discussed in Abbasi et al.).
   - **Verification and validation (V&V) protocols**: **Cross-referencing** of DT outputs with physical measurements to validate control logic and predictions.
   - **Reinforcement learning validation**: **Post-occupancy evaluation** of control policies (e.g., in BOREALIS) to refine energy-efficiency strategies."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **Eclipse Hono** for **IoT device connectivity** (e.g., MQTT, CoAP protocols) and **Eclipse Ditto** for **twin synchronization** (RESTful APIs, WebSockets). The physical-to-virtual connection uses **device-specific endpoints** (e.g., tenant IDs, device IDs) configured in the BIM model. Virtual-to-physical interactions rely on **Ditto’s bidirectional communication channels**, enabling **real-time control commands** (e.g., HVAC adjustments). The framework supports **secure, low-latency connections** for critical applications (e.g., safety systems)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed in a **cloud-native, service-oriented architecture**, with:
   - **Eclipse Ditto** hosted as a **microservice** for twin management and data processing.
   - **Eclipse Hono** deployed as a **lightweight IoT gateway** for device connectivity.
   - **Unreal Engine 5 assets** rendered on **client-side devices** (e.g., facility manager workstations) for visualization.
   - **BIM models** stored in a **centralized repository** (e.g., BIM server) for version control and collaboration.
   The deployment is **modular and scalable**, allowing components to be deployed independently (e.g., Ditto on Kubernetes, Unreal Engine on local machines)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT supports **horizontal integration** with:
   - **External IoT platforms**: Compatibility with **MQTT brokers, CoAP servers**, and other IoT ecosystems via Eclipse Hono.
   - **Building Management Systems (BMS)**: Interoperability with proprietary BMS (e.g., Siemens Desigo, Honeywell) through standardized APIs.
   - **Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems**: Data exchange for **cost modeling, asset tracking, and lifecycle management**.
   - **Other Digital Twins**: Potential integration with **city-scale DTs** or **infrastructure networks** via **semantic interoperability layers** (e.g., ontologies for AECO standards)."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy are addressed through:
   - **BIM model ownership**: Typically retained by the **building owner or design firm**, with controlled access for facility managers and DT engineers.
   - **Runtime data ownership**: **Physical asset owner** retains primary ownership, but **DT service providers** may manage processed data (e.g., analytics outputs) under **data processing agreements**.
   - **Privacy safeguards**: **Anonymization of occupancy data**, **role-based access control (RBAC)** in Ditto, and **compliance with GDPR/building-specific regulations** (e.g., LEED standards)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
   - **BIM standards**: **IFC (Industry Foundation Classes)** for semantic interoperability and **COBie (Construction Operations Building Information Exchange)** for asset handover.
   - **IoT standards**: **MQTT, CoAP, and OMA LWM2M** for device connectivity via Eclipse Hono.
   - **Digital Twin standards**: **Ditto’s RESTful APIs** and **Eclipse IoT standards** for twin synchronization.
   - **Control system standards**: **KNX, BACnet, or Modbus** for BCS interoperability (where applicable).
   - **Model-Driven Engineering (MDE)**: **MOF (Meta-Object Facility)** and **QVT (Query/View/Transformation)** for automated deployments."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
   - **Authentication and authorization**: **Role-based access control (RBAC)** in Ditto for restricting DT interactions (e.g., facility managers vs. DT engineers).
   - **Data encryption**: **TLS/SSL** for all IoT and twin communication channels.
   - **Network segmentation**: Isolation of **critical control systems** (e.g., HVAC) from non-critical services to prevent unauthorized access.
   - **Safety protocols**: **Fail-safe mechanisms** for actuators (e.g., emergency shutdowns) and **real-time monitoring** of physical states to prevent hazards.
   - **Compliance**: Adherence to **ISO/IEC 42010 (Systems Engineering)** and **IEC 62443 (Industrial Cybersecurity)** for secure DT operations."
]
